name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
🌅 GM Bot — track your daily morning check-ins!

Tap 🌅 GM once per UTC day to check in. If you tap again the same day, you'll see a quiet confirmation — no spam.

📊 Stats shows your total GM count, current streak, and last check-in date. A streak is the number of consecutive UTC days you've checked in. Missing a day resets it.

Commands:
/start — open the main menu
/stats — view your GM statistics
/help — show this explanation

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
